metadata.purpose: Release of approved loan funds to borrowers across all business segments
metadata.trigger: Final credit approval received with signed loan agreement and all CPs satisfied

process_steps.name: Receive Approved Loan Package
process_steps.description: Receives the approved loan package from Credit Committee or automated approval engine. Verifies all approval conditions are met. Checks that loan agreement is signed and all conditions precedent (CPs) are satisfied. Legal reviews loan documentation before disbursement proceeds.
process_steps.input: Approved credit memo, signed loan agreement, CP checklist
process_steps.output: Verified loan package ready for setup

process_steps.name: Validate Customer & Account Details
process_steps.description: Confirms borrower identity, validates destination account details, checks KYC status is current, and verifies no sanctions hits. Cross-checks customer data between LoanIQ and T24.
process_steps.input: Customer ID, account details from loan agreement
process_steps.output: Validated customer record, confirmed destination account

process_steps.name: Set Up Loan in Core Banking
process_steps.description: Creates the loan account in T24, enters repayment schedule, interest rate, fees, and tenor. Links to the customer's main account. Sets up automated debit orders for repayments.
process_steps.output: Active loan account in T24, repayment schedule configured

process_steps.name: Four-Eyes Verification
process_steps.description: Independent review of loan setup. Verifies all fields match the approved credit memo: amount, rate, tenor, fees, repayment schedule, destination account. Checks for any override flags.
process_steps.input: Loan setup in T24, original credit memo

process_steps.name: Generate Disbursement Instructions
process_steps.description: Generates the payment instruction based on disbursement type: internal transfer, RTGS, EFT, or SWIFT. Applies correct value dating. For syndicated loans, generates multiple payment instructions.
process_steps.input: Verified loan account, destination account details

process_steps.name: Compliance Hold Check
process_steps.description: Automated screening of payment against sanctions lists, PEP databases, and adverse media. Transactions above threshold ($500K) require manual compliance officer review.

process_steps.name: Treasury Funding Confirmation
process_steps.description: Confirms that funds are available in the lending pool. For large disbursements (>$5M), treasury may need to arrange funding. Confirms FX rate if disbursement is in foreign currency.
process_steps.output: Funding confirmation, FX rate lock (if applicable)

process_steps.name: Authorize & Release Payment
process_steps.description: Final authorization of the payment. For amounts >$5M, dual authorization required. Releases the payment instruction to the payment gateway/SWIFT network.

process_steps.name: Payment Execution & Confirmation
process_steps.description: Payment is executed through the appropriate channel. System sends MT103 (SWIFT) or local clearing instruction. Waits for confirmation/acknowledgment from receiving bank.

process_steps.name: Post-Disbursement Processing
process_steps.description: Updates loan status to Active/Disbursed. Archives all documentation in DMS. Sends disbursement confirmation to borrower via email/portal. Updates CRM with disbursement details. Generates fee invoices if applicable.
process_steps.output: Updated loan records, archived documents, customer notification

process_exceptions.title: Partial Disbursement
process_exceptions.handling: Each tranche requires separate CP verification and drawdown request

process_exceptions.title: Rejected Payment
process_exceptions.handling: Investigation, correction, and re-submission. Average resolution: 1 business day

process_exceptions.title: Compliance Hold
process_exceptions.handling: Compliance officer investigation before release. Average false positive resolution: 2 hours

pain_points.title: Manual re-keying LoanIQ to T24
pain_points.root_cause: No automated interface between loan origination and core banking

pain_points.title: Four-eyes verification bottleneck
pain_points.root_cause: Only 2 authorized verifiers, causing delays during peak hours (11am-2pm)

pain_points.title: No automated treasury notification
pain_points.root_cause: Manual phone/email communication to treasury for funding confirmation

pain_points.title: Manual document archiving
pain_points.root_cause: Physical scanning and uploading to OpenText, 10+ minutes per disbursement

pain_points.title: Compliance false positives (~15%)
pain_points.root_cause: Fircosoft screening rules produce ~15% false positive rate, each taking ~2 hours to resolve

controls.title: Conditions Precedent Check
controls.description: All CPs must be satisfied before disbursement. Checklist sign-off required.

controls.title: KYC/Sanctions Screening
controls.description: Current KYC and clean sanctions screen mandatory. Regulatory requirement under AML/CFT Act.

controls.title: Four-Eyes Verification
controls.description: Independent verification of loan setup. Maker-checker principle enforced by system through user ID checks.

controls.title: Compliance Screening
controls.description: Automated + manual AML/sanctions check. Regulatory requirement.

controls.title: Dual Authorization
controls.description: Required for disbursements >$5M. Digital signatures with audit trail.

discrepancies.description: PS-LD-006 references 'AML System' as a separate system, but Systems table does not list it independently — confirmed as Fircosoft module
PS-LD-005 and PS-LD-008 reference 'Payment Gateway' — added as SYS-LD-010
Section 6 (Organizational Mapping) — RACI matrix and team responsibilities auto-filled from process step data
Section 1.6 Cost & Resource Allocation has no data — all fields marked [To be expanded]
discrepancies.deferred_reason: Requires finance team input — cost per transaction, FTE allocation, and annual operating cost not available from process documentation

discrepancies.description: All 5 control points — effectiveness assessments populated based on process data and pain points
Section 7 (Existing Documentation References) has minimal content — KPIs and DTPs not documented
discrepancies.deferred_reason: Requires operations/quality team input — KPI definitions and DTP references not available from current source material

discrepancies.description: PS-LD-010 — SYS-LD-003 (Salesforce CRM) added to system list
